emails.subject: March Floorplan Reconciliation — Approved
emails.body_text:
Darius,

March floorplan reconciliation reviewed and approved. All units tied to the lender statement. Good work on catching the curtailment on N2038 before it aged out.

Marcus Hale
Assistant Controller
Sunshine & Set Automotive

emails.subject: Floorplan Reconciliation — March 2026
emails.body_text:
Marcus,

Attached is the March month-end floorplan reconciliation. All units reconciled to the JM Family statement within $50. No aged curtailments. Two units over 60 days flagged in the aging report.

Darius Kim
Inventory Accountant
Sunshine & Set Automotive

emails.subject: Wholesale Authorization — U1091 (2021 Altima SV)
emails.body_text:
Darius,

Approval to wholesale U1091 (2021 Nissan Altima SV, VIN 1N4BL4BV0MN504510). 91 days on lot. Book cost $10,800 (ACV $8,200 + pack $750 + recon $1,850). Minimum bid $7,500. Sending to Orlando Auto Auction 04/01.

Please update inventory schedule when the vehicle leaves the lot.

Trent Holloway
Used Car Manager
Sunshine & Set Automotive

emails.subject: Wholesale Recorded — U1091 — Loss $2,900
emails.body_text:
Trent,

Wholesale recorded for U1091. Net proceeds $7,900, book cost $10,800, loss $2,900. Loss exceeds $2,500 threshold — flagged to Marcus per SOP.

Floorplan payoff for U1091 processed same day. Unit removed from inventory schedule and floorplan worksheet.

Darius Kim
Inventory Accountant
Sunshine & Set Automotive

emails.subject: Recon Invoice SBP-4812 — U1093 (BMW 330i) — $2,800
emails.body_text:
Darius,

Attached is Invoice SBP-4812 for reconditioning on U1093 (2022 BMW 330i). Total: $2,800. Work included brake replacement, full detail, and minor body repair. Trent approved since it exceeds the $2,000 individual recon threshold.

Grant Ellis
Service Director
Sunshine & Set Automotive

emails.subject: Vehicle Purchase Complete — Received 2026 Tundra SR5 (N2049) from Lakewood Toyota
emails.body_text:
Darius,

Vehicle purchase completed yesterday from Lakewood Toyota. Details:

RECEIVED:
- Stock: N2049
- Vehicle: 2026 Toyota Tundra SR5
- Transportation: $0 (Lakewood delivered)
- Vehicle arrived on lot this morning and keys are in the lockbox

Trent Holloway
